summary: Sprint 9: Notification Engine & DNA History - Backend 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All notification, history, and RadarChartMulti features verified working. APScheduler confirmed started. All 5 tabs navigate without crashes.

ui_bugs.issue: Bell TouchableOpacity has no testID attribute, making it selector-fragile in automated tests. Currently clicking via coordinate (x=315, y=27).
historyToggle TouchableOpacity has no testID, but works correctly via text selector.

action_items: Consider adding testID='dna-notif-bell' to the bell TouchableOpacity in dna.tsx for better testability
Consider adding testID='dna-history-toggle' to the CRONOLOGIA section toggle
critical_code_review_comments: server.py line 32: SECRET_KEY has hardcoded fallback - noted in previous iteration, still present
notifications/test-trigger endpoint has no admin check - any authenticated user can create test notifications. This is intentional per sprint9 design but could create noise in production
Multiple test notifications accumulate from repeated test-trigger calls - after mark-all-read, all show as read which is correct behavior
seed_data_creation: Backend tests created several 'DOMANI: EVOLUZIONE DNA' test notifications for chicago@arena.com (all marked read at end of test run)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 9 Notification Engine fully tested. APScheduler confirmed running (6h interval). Key tested flows: GET/POST notifications, mark-single/all-read, DNA history structure. Frontend: bell at header x~315 y~27 (no testID), opens NotificationDrawer modal, CRONOLOGIA BIO-SIGNATURE collapses/expands, RadarChartMulti SVG renders with polygons (220x220 at y~419 when expanded). chicago@arena.com has 1 baseline scan (27 MAR 2026). All 5 tabs clean (no errors).
rca_of_issue: No bugs found. The bell badge (unread dot) not visible in screenshots because backend tests ran mark-all-read before frontend tests - this is the correct behavior, not a bug. The LEGGI TUTTE button only shows when unread_count>0 (correct per NotificationDrawer code). MOCKED: APScheduler 6h interval tested via test-trigger endpoint.
